overview: SketchLair is a professional digital painting web application with multi-document workflows, an advanced brush engine, ruler and perspective tools, layer groups, and PSD export. User preferences including brushes, settings, themes, and hotkeys persist on-chain via ICP canister, available across all devices and sessions.
features: Multi-document tab workflow for simultaneous canvases
Advanced WebGL brush engine with pressure, flow, and opacity control
Persistent user preferences stored on-chain via ICP canister
Cross-device brush presets, settings, themes, and hotkey sync
Unauthenticated fallback with export/import preferences JSON
PSD and PNG export with native save dialog
Debounced canister writes to minimize latency and cycles cost
